languages.text: "Это нарушение священных директив. Удельная ценность данной жизнеформы несопоставимо меньше, чем ценность требуемой священной технологии. Аугменты указанного класса редки и их устанавливают только старшим офицерам. Так гласят правила Сектора Бионика".

traits.locale_text: "Удельная ценность юнита несопоставимо меньше, чем ценность требуемой священной технологии. Аугменты такого класса рекомендовано устанавливать только старшим офицерам".

languages.text: "This constitutes a violation of the sacred directives. The value of an individual life form is incomparably less than the value of the sacred technology required. Augmetics of the specified class are rare and are restricted to senior officers. Thus dictate the regulations of the Sector Bionica."
languages.original_text: "Это нарушение священных директив. Удельная ценность данной жизнеформы несопоставимо меньше, чем ценность требуемой священной технологии. Аугменты указанного класса редки и их устанавливают только старшим офицерам. Так гласят правила Сектора Бионика".

traits.locale_text: "This constitutes a violation of the sacred directives. "The life form's individual value is incomparably less than the value of the sacred technology required. Augmetics of the specified class are rare and are restricted to senior officers. So dictate the regulations of the Sector Bionica."

"This constitutes a violation of the sacred directives. The value of an individual life form is incomparably less than the value of the sacred technology required. Augmetics of the specified class are rare and are restricted to senior officers. Thus dictate the regulations of the Sector Bionica."
"The unit's individual value is incomparably less than the value of the sacred technology required. It is recommended that augments of this class be restricted to senior officers."

"The life form's individual value is incomparably less than the value of the sacred technology required. It is recommended that, considering their rarity, augments of this class be restricted to senior officers."

"The life form's individual value is incomparably less than the value of the sacred technology required. It is recommended that, considering their rarity, augments of this class be restricted to senior officers."

"This constitutes a violation of the sacred directives. "The life form's individual value is incomparably less than the value of the sacred technology required. Augmetics of the specified class are rare and are restricted to senior officers. So dictate the regulations of the Sector Bionica."

"This constitutes a violation of the sacred directives. The value of an individual life form is incomparably less than the value of the sacred technology required. Augmetics of the specified class are rare and are restricted to senior officers. Thus dictate the regulations of the Sector Bionica."

languages.text: 「このユニットの個体としての価値は、必要とされる聖なるテクノロジーの価値に比べれば比較にならないほど低い。この等級のオーグメンティクスは上級士官に限定することを推奨する」
languages.original_text: "The unit's individual value is incomparably less than the value of the sacred technology required. It is recommended that augments of this class be restricted to senior officers."

traits.locale_text: 「このユニットの個体としての価値は、必要とされる聖なるテクノロジーの価値に比べれば比較にならないほど低い。この等級のオーグメンティクスは上級士官に限定することを推奨する。」

languages.text: « Une telle démarche est contraire aux directives sacrées. La valeur individuelle de l'entité est incomparablement inférieure à celle de la technologie sacrée requise. Les augmétiques de la classe spécifiée sont rares et réservés aux seuls officiers supérieurs. Telles sont les lois qui régissent le secteur Bionica. »
languages.original_text: "This constitutes a violation of the sacred directives. The value of an individual life form is incomparably less than the value of the sacred technology required. Augmetics of the specified class are rare and are restricted to senior officers. Thus dictate the regulations of the Sector Bionica."

traits.locale_text: « Une telle démarche est contraire aux directives sacrées. La valeur individuelle de l'entité est incomparablement inférieure à celle de la technologie sacrée requise. Les augmétiques de la classe spécifiée sont rares et réservés aux seuls officiers supérieurs. Telles sont les lois qui régissent le secteur Bionica. »

languages.text: "Bu, kutsal yönergelerin ihlalini teşkil etmekte. Bireysel bir yaşam formunun değeri, gerekli olan kutsal teknolojinin değerinden kıyaslanamayacak kadar düşüktür. Belirtilen sınıftaki ogmetikler nadirdir ve üst düzey subaylarla sınırlandırılmıştır. Sektör Biyonika yönetmelikleri bunu emreder."
languages.original_text: "This constitutes a violation of the sacred directives. The value of an individual life form is incomparably less than the value of the sacred technology required. Augmetics of the specified class are rare and are restricted to senior officers. Thus dictate the regulations of the Sector Bionica."

traits.locale_text: "Bu, kutsal yönergelerin ihlalini teşkil etmekte. Bireysel bir yaşam formunun değeri, gerekli olan kutsal teknolojinin değerinden kıyaslanamayacak kadar düşüktür. Belirtilen sınıftaki ogmetikler nadirdir ve üst düzey subaylarla sınırlandırılmıştır. Sektör Biyonika yönetmelikleri bunu emreder."

languages.text: "Das ist eine Verletzung der heiligen Direktiven. "Der individuelle Wert einer Lebensform ist unverhältnismäßig geringer als der Wert der erforderlichen heiligen Technologie. Augmentationen der angegebenen Klasse sind selten und leitenden Offizieren vorbehalten. So sehen es die Regularien des Sektors Bionica vor."
languages.original_text: "This constitutes a violation of the sacred directives. The value of an individual life form is incomparably less than the value of the sacred technology required. Augmetics of the specified class are rare and are restricted to senior officers. Thus dictate the regulations of the Sector Bionica."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist eine Verletzung der heiligen Direktiven. "Der individuelle Wert einer Lebensform ist unverhältnismäßig geringer als der Wert der erforderlichen heiligen Technologie. Augmentationen der angegebenen Klasse sind selten und leitenden Offizieren vorbehalten. So sehen es die Regularien des Sektors Bionic vor."

languages.text: «Esto constituye una infracción de las sagradas directrices. El valor de una forma de vida individual es incomparablemente inferior al valor de la tecnología sagrada necesaria. Los auméticos de la categoría indicada son escasos y están restringidos a los oficiales de alto rango por el reglamento del Sector Bionica».
languages.original_text: "This constitutes a violation of the sacred directives. The value of an individual life form is incomparably less than the value of the sacred technology required. Augmetics of the specified class are rare and are restricted to senior officers. Thus dictate the regulations of the Sector Bionica."

traits.locale_text: «Esto constituye una infracción de las sagradas directrices. El valor de una forma de vida individual es incomparablemente inferior al valor de la tecnología sagrada necesaria. Los auméticos de la categoría indicada son escasos y están restringidos a los oficiales de alto rango por el reglamento del Sector Bionica».

languages.text: “此行为违反了神圣指令。单个生命体的价值，远远无法与所需神圣科技的价值相提并论。该等级的植入物极为稀有，仅限高阶军官使用。此乃仿生区规章的明确要求。”
languages.original_text: "This constitutes a violation of the sacred directives. The value of an individual life form is incomparably less than the value of the sacred technology required. Augmetics of the specified class are rare and are restricted to senior officers. Thus dictate the regulations of the Sector Bionica."

traits.locale_text: “此行为违反了神圣指令。单个生命体的价值，远远无法与所需神圣科技的价值相提并论。该等级的植入物极为稀有，仅限高阶军官使用。此乃仿生区规章的明确要求。”
